description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named PyLops-coverage that runs on push and pull request target events. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10). For each combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies and PyLops, run pytest with coverage, and upload the coverage report to Codacy using the codacy-coverage-reporter-action.
